name: Dog
description: Library component. Models a dog -- gastown's infrastructure-worker pattern (per gastown-src/internal/dog/). Dogs are non-Claude workers (shell scripts, deployment tooling) that the Deacon assigns plugin work to. Distinct from Polecats: dogs are stateless workers; the Deacon manages their assignment lifecycle. Comparison to gastown-guide/dog-dispatch: that monolith has Dog plus per-rig Worktree actors (Rig1Worktree, Rig2Worktree) inline. This library component models just the Dog state machine; multi-rig coordination becomes the composing application's concern.

ASSIGN.description: receives an assignment from the Deacon to handle a plugin task. Tagged 'Assign'.

CLEAR.description: receives a clear signal from the Deacon when work is done or the dog should be freed. Tagged 'Clear'.

actors.name: Dog
actors.owner: Infrastructure worker. Idle = available for assignment. Working = handling an assigned plugin task. Returns to Idle on Clear. Doesn't model the work itself (that's plugin-specific); just the lifecycle state.

triples.event: deacon assigns plugin work to dog
deacon clears the dog (work complete or dog freed)
